goregistries.description: A Go module namespace identified by the first component of a canonical module path (for example github.com or golang.org).

modules.description: A Go module available in the registry, including its metadata and published versions.

modulepath.description: The canonical Go module path reconstructed from the group and module identity.

latest_version.description: The latest known version of this module.

repository.description: VCS repository URL inferred from the module path.

info_url.description: GOPROXY .info endpoint URL for the latest version.

mod_url.description: GOPROXY .mod endpoint URL for the latest version.

zip_url.description: GOPROXY .zip endpoint URL for the latest version.

gomod_hash.description: Hash of the go.mod file (from Go checksum database).

zip_hash.description: Hash of the module zip file (from Go checksum database).

pseudo_version.description: Whether this version is a pseudo-version (e.g. v0.0.0-20210101000000-abcdef012345).

pre_release.description: Whether this is a pre-release version.

retracted.description: Whether this version has been retracted.

retract_rationale.description: Rationale for retraction if the version has been retracted.
